settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your preferences, data, and API connections.

canvas.title: Canvas Preferences
canvas.desc: Choose between a truly infinite freeform canvas or structured A4 format page sheets.
canvas.infiniteDesc: Truly infinite workspace like OneNote. Scroll and pan freely in any direction.
canvas.a4Desc: Structured page-by-page sheets. Add, select, and delete individual A4 pages.
canvas.autoCompleteOnSuccessDesc: Automatically mark a task as completed when the AI returns a score of 100.

data.title: Data Management
data.autoExportDesc: Regularly save a copy of your configuration parameters.
data.autoDataDesc: Regularly save a copy of your lessons and practice history.

notifications.importDbError: Invalid data format. Expected an array of lessons.

api.title: API Settings
api.customModelPressEnter: Press enter or type custom model...
api.autoProviderInfo: OpenRouter will automatically choose the best available provider.
api.providerSearchPlaceholder: Type to search and add providers...
api.reasoningDesc: Sends reasoning configurations to OpenRouter models (like DeepSeek R1). Disable to save tokens.
api.evaluationDetailsDesc: Configure what task details are sent to the AI model during "Check Work" evaluations.
api.testConnectionNoKey: Error: Please enter an API key first.

systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
systemPrompt.desc: Here you can view and edit the global instructions sent to the AI model during evaluations.
systemPrompt.enableCustomDesc: Allows you to overwrite the default grading instructions.
systemPrompt.warningDesc: Das Bearbeiten des System-Prompts erfolgt auf eigene Gefahr! Falsche Anweisungen oder fehlende Platzhalter können das Programm funktionsunfähig machen (z. B. wenn das JSON-Format nicht eingehalten wird).
systemPrompt.confirmEditMsg: Warning: Editing the system prompt is at your own risk! Incorrect changes can damage the program or cause the AI parser to fail. Do you really want to enable editing?

stylus.title: Stylus Button Actions
stylus.desc: Customize how your stylus buttons and eraser tips behave on the canvas.
stylus.howToStep1: Click the "Detect Stylus Button" button below to start detection mode.
stylus.howToStep2: Touch your stylus to the display screen.
stylus.howToStep3: Press the physical button on your stylus that you want to map. (Nothing will register until you press the button).
stylus.howToStep4: The button will be recorded, added to the list below, and detection mode will end.
stylus.noButtons: No custom button actions configured. Click "Detect Stylus Button" above to detect and map one.
stylus.modalStep1: 1. Place your stylus tip on the display.
stylus.modalStep2: 2. Press the stylus button you wish to map.
stylus.modalWarning: Nothing will happen until you press a button on the pen.

stats.title: Usage Statistics
stats.desc: Track API request quantities, token counts, and estimated cost aggregates.
stats.controlsDesc: Resetting will wipe all tracking logs. Statistics are included in your settings export backups.
stats.confirmResetMsg: Are you sure you want to reset all usage statistics? This will permanently delete the history. This action cannot be undone.
stats.notifyResetSuccess: Usage statistics have been reset successfully.

dashboard.title: Lesson Dashboard
dashboard.activeLessons: You have {count} active lessons in progress.
dashboard.deleteLessonConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This will permanently discard this calligraphy lesson, its task lists, reference files, and historical practice logs.
dashboard.dragDropDesc: Drop your .json lesson file anywhere here to import it into your workspace.

notifications.dropValidJson: Please drop a valid .json lesson file.
notifications.parseFailed: Failed to parse file. Make sure it is valid JSON.

dialogs.exportPrompt: Choose what additional information you want to save along with the lesson "{name}":
dialogs.exportCritiqueDesc: Saves the reviews, scores, and highlighted corrections made by the AI helper.
dialogs.exportNoCritiqueDesc: No AI feedback has been generated yet for this lesson.
dialogs.exportCanvasDesc: Saves the actual drawings, letters, and practices you wrote on the screen canvas.
dialogs.exportNoCanvasDesc: No handwriting or drawings have been recorded yet in this lesson.
dialogs.exportCompletedDesc: Saves whether tasks are marked as finished or not.
dialogs.importPrompt: This file contains a calligraphy lesson. Select which items you would like to import:
dialogs.importCritiqueDesc: Loads the reviews, scores, and highlighted corrections previously saved.
dialogs.importNoCritiqueDesc: No AI feedback was found in this file.
dialogs.importCanvasDesc: Loads the handwritten practices and strokes previously drawn on the screens.
dialogs.importNoCanvasDesc: No handwriting or drawings were found in this file.
dialogs.importCompletedDesc: Loads the checked/unchecked status of tasks from the file.
dialogs.importMergeModeTitle: For Tasks with the Same Name

profile.uploadTip: JPG, PNG supported. Square image recommended.
profile.confirmDeleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete the profile "{name}"?
profile.confirmDeleteWarning: WARNING: This will permanently delete this theme profile, all its associated calligraphy lessons (lessons), and all assignments/drawings. This action cannot be undone.
profile.confirmDeleteSureDesc: Yes, I want to permanently delete "{name}" and all its lessons.

taskEditor.createSubtitle: Define the parameters and provide reference materials for this assignment.
taskEditor.editSubtitle: Modify details or requirements for this script assignment.
taskEditor.instructionsPlaceholder: Write detailed step-by-step instructions. Markdown is supported.
taskEditor.uploadPrompt: Tap to upload or drag reference files
taskEditor.uploadPromptSolution: Tap to upload or drag solution files
taskEditor.uploadSupportInfo: Supports PDF, PNG, JPG, TXT, MD (Max 25MB, multiple files supported)
taskEditor.solutionPlaceholder: Provide the expected outcome. This prompt is passed to the AI to grade the handwriting.
taskEditor.apiCostWarningDesc: Too many documents increase the API context size, which can make the results less accurate and increase costs. Please only upload the necessary reference materials.

notifications.selectLesson: Please select a lesson or create one first.
notifications.pasteError: No image or text found in clipboard.
notifications.pasteTextError: Clipboard is empty or does not contain text.
notifications.pastePermission: Could not paste from clipboard. Please allow permission.

projectDetail.emptyTasks: No assignments in this category yet. Click Add to create one.
projectDetail.deleteCategoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the category "{name}"? This will move all its assignments to the 'Basics' category.
projectDetail.overviewDesc: Reorder tasks by dragging, customize topics, or click a task to open the practice canvas.
projectDetail.guidelinesSubtitle: These guidelines are sent to the AI for every task in this lesson
projectDetail.guidelinesPlaceholder: e.g., Always show your working, write neatly, answers must include units...
projectDetail.guidelinesFooter: These instructions will be included when the AI checks the student's work on any task in this lesson.
projectDetail.deleteTopicConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete the topic "{category}"? Any tasks inside will be moved to your default topic.
projectDetail.addTaskInTopicTooltip: Create a new task in this topic
projectDetail.deleteTaskConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This will permanently delete the task and its canvas drawing history.
projectDetail.noTasksInSection: No tasks in this section. Drag tasks here or create one.
projectDetail.deleteSelectedTasksMsg: Are you sure you want to delete the {count} selected tasks? This will permanently delete them and their canvas drawing history.

lessonSettings.overrideSettingsDesc: Customize API connections, prompts, and details for this specific lesson.
lessonSettings.overrideGlobalDesc: Enable to configure specific models and parameters for this lesson.
lessonSettings.enableCustomPromptDesc: Allows you to overwrite the default grading instructions for this lesson.
lessonSettings.usingGlobalDesc: This lesson currently uses the global configuration from settings (Provider: {provider}, Model: {model}).
lessonSettings.usingGlobalHint: Toggle "Override Global AI & API Settings" above to customize.

practice.deletePageConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete Page {page}? All drawings on this page will be permanently lost.
practice.toggleStylusMode: Toggle Stylus Mode (Finger/mouse pans, only stylus draws)
practice.stylusModeDesc: Disables finger touch drawing to prevent accidental marks.
